headline: Is CarMax (KMX) Offering Value After A 40% One Year Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether CarMax's current share price reflects its true value, this breakdown will help you frame that question using several valuation angles. The stock closed at US$39.91, with a 1.5% gain over the last week, a 7.9% decline over 30 days, a 1.6% return year to date, and a 40.0% decline over the last year. These moves raise questions about how the market is currently weighing its risks and prospects. Recent attention around CarMax has focused on its position in the used...
